params.amount: The amount of the asset to transfer.
params.asset: The ERC20 token address on the Hub (e.g., USDC).
params.destAccount: The account on the destination chain to receive assets.
params.destChainId: The parachain ID of the destination.
params.transactPayload: Encoded call to execute on the destination chain.        Pass empty bytes for a simple transfer with no remote execution.

returns.success: Whether the XCM message was successfully queued.

transferAssets(uint256,address,address,u.notice: Transfer assets to a destination parachain and optionally         execute a remote call (e.g., deposit into a yield pool).
